action.description:
Introduced by Senators Pfaff, Drake, Habush Sinykin, Hesselbein, Larson, Roys, Ratcliff, Spreitzer and Dassler-Alfheim; 
cosponsored by Representatives Vining, Hong, Joers, Arney, Bare, Billings, Clancy, DeSanto, DeSmidt, Doyle, Emerson, Fitzgerald, Kirsch, Madison, Mayadev, McCarville, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Palmeri, Phelps, Prado, Roe, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Spaude, Stroud, Stubbs, Subeck, Tenorio and Udell
